meaning: n.舌头,舌状物,语言,说话方式,口语vt.舔,闲谈,斥责vi.吹管乐器
examples: She stuck her tongue out at me.
The dog's tongue was hanging out.
She ran her tongue over her lips.
But Professor of Government Stephen Haseler certainly won't be holding his tongue this time around.
The prize gives special consideration to the promotion of mother-tongue languages in developing countries.
